Based on the retrieved evidence, the correct definition of ICD-10 remains unchanged from our initial discussions—ICD-10 stands for **International Classification of Diseases, 10th revision**, representing a universal system used by healthcare professionals for diagnosing and coding illnesses and injuries. Each piece of evidence either supports or indirectly confirms this point without introducing conflicting information.
